---
title: Notes on Procedural Generation 
layout: default
---

Some somewhat random notes on procedural generation (PG).

- PG is often used in games and its use is quite advanced there. 
    - It somehow seems underutilised in other areas. I wonder why... 
- I have not seen much PG music that I liked. Maybe I am not active enough with 
my investigations there. 
    - Note: Nerve (Jojo Mayer) does actually represent a nice parabola to that and 
    there is probably something to be told there. But I am not yet sure what.
- Strong/Mighty generators should be accompanied with
    - (a) tools to restrict them and 
    - (b) tools to analyse the generator itself
